title: gleichenia circinnata var. microphylla
intro: Gleichenia circinnata var. microphylla, also known as the Microphylla Fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gleichenia circinnata var. microphylla include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas or infusions for consumption, as well as being used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
